_comment: Auto-repair fixture: stage 6 (client CI under docker) failure at attempt 1. Stage 6 discovers the client's own gate commands (pnpm run lint, tsc --noEmit, vitest --run …) via discover-client-ci, runs them under docker, and on the first FAIL calls emitTrpJFailure with stage_label 'TRP7 client CI'. This is the canonical 'CI failure retry' branch of the auto-repair loop — exit 66 by definition.
